title: stenanthium gramineum
intro: Stenanthium gramineum, also known as the grass-leaved false unicorn or grass-leaved stenanthium, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Stenanthium gramineum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and ease digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Stenanthium gramineum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory and digestive health.
